candidate_inventory.execution_evidence: Repository search found the four exact form IDs only in their frozen v1 task/source/key/protocol files; the retained v1 feasibility report records zero model calls and zero provider attempts.

gate_results.evidence: cross-pilot-repeated-task-matrix/v1 freezes two exact forms in each of evidence-reconciliation and incident-state; its feasibility report records model_calls=0.
Both protocol candidate_families entries have family_level_source_authority=null; available source-pack.json files are task-instance records, not pre-task procedural authority corpora.
All four task.md files directly state the authority/scope or signed/applicable filters, threshold or supersession rule, decisive consequence, reconciliation obligation, and exact output path.
Source-treatment feasibility failed first; no call may be unlocked by push alone.
No generation corpus or package was created.
Blocked by source-treatment separation before execution canaries.
Existing grader self-test evidence is not enough to cure the treatment-identification failure.
No provider probe was warranted after the earlier fail-closed gate.

blocking_gate.effect: The no-package/no-raw arm already receives the full procedure. A generated or raw-context arm would add duplicated wording or newly authored post-form content, so any difference could not identify pre-task source distillation or reusable procedural transfer.
blocking_gate.fail_closed_action: Stop before package generation, provider probes, isolation canaries, and executor calls; retain all claim ceilings as false.

continuation: Version a v2 only after prospectively freezing one independent source-authority corpus per family and at least two untouched tasks per family whose public prompts specify deliverables and fair consequences without copying the complete source procedure. Then freeze source/task family assignment, source-only generator prompt, reference and negative-control lineage, package hashes, opaque schedule, and equal-envelope canaries before any model call.
